title: Midwest Annual Electricity Prices Skyrocket Amid High NG And Capacity Shortfall

title: Vistra to Report First Quarter 2022 Results on May 6, 2022
text: IRVING, Texas , April 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Vistra (NYSE: VST) plans to report its first quarter 2022 financial and operating results on Friday, May 6, 2022.  Management will present the materials during a live conference call and webcast beginning at 8 a.m.
